title: Too Close to the Sun
overview: When he leaves hospital, 30-something Basil moves in with his younger sister and closest confidant, Sarah. Living with a psychiatric disorder, Basil tries his best to re-establish a sense of normality in both his work and his love life.  But, whilst hiding his illness from his new relatives, how long can he maintain this fragile stability?
